EMAIL_ALREADY_EXISTS: An account with this email already exists.
REFRESH_TOKEN_REPLAYED: Refresh token replayed; the session has been revoked. Sign in again.
LOGIN_LOCKED: Too many failed login attempts. Try again later.
TOS_NOT_ACCEPTED: Acceptance of the Terms of Service is required.
VERIFY_RESEND_COOLDOWN: Verification code resent too recently. Try again shortly.
NO_ACTIVE_VERIFICATION: No active verification code; request a new one.
VERIFY_TOO_MANY_ATTEMPTS: Too many wrong attempts; request a new code.
PASSWORD_RESET_CONSUMED: Password reset link has already been used.
MFA_NOT_ENABLED: Two-factor authentication is not enabled for this account.
MFA_ENROLLMENT_NOT_STARTED: No pending two-factor enrollment; start a new one.
MFA_TOKEN_INVALID: Two-factor session token is invalid or expired.
MFA_RATE_LIMITED: Too many wrong codes. Try again later.
SKILL_OVERRIDE_FORBIDDEN: Overriding this skill is not allowed.
SKILL_BUDGET_EXCEEDED: Compiled prompt exceeds the configured token budget.
BRAND_NOT_IN_WORKSPACE: Brand does not belong to the active workspace.
ACTIVE_BRAND_REQUIRED: No active brand could be resolved. Pass an explicit brand id in the URL or send the X-Active-Brand-Id header.
CHANNEL_NOT_FOUND: Channel not found on the platform.
CHANNEL_ALREADY_CONNECTED: This channel is already connected to the brand.
CHANNEL_NOT_CONNECTED: This channel is not connected to the brand.
BOT_NOT_ADMIN: The bot is not an administrator in this channel. Add it as an admin and retry.
BOT_MISSING_POST_PERMISSION: The bot is an administrator but doesn't have permission to post messages.
TELEGRAM_API_ERROR: Telegram Bot API call failed; please retry.
CHANNEL_BACKFILL_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: Requested backfill window is larger than the per-call limit. Reduce 'limit' and retry.
CHANNEL_BACKFILL_NOT_CONFIGURED: History backfill is not configured for this channel. Contact support to enable it.
TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_UNAUTHORIZED: Telegram webhook request is not authorised.
LLM_BUDGET_EXCEEDED: Request exceeded the configured LLM token budget.
COMPETITOR_NOT_PUBLIC: Competitor channels must be public (have an @username). Private channels can't be connected to the Inspiration Board.
COMPETITOR_ALREADY_CONNECTED: This competitor channel is already connected to the brand.
USERBOT_NO_AVAILABLE_SESSION: No user-bot sessions are currently available. Try again in a few minutes.
BRAND_QUOTA_EXCEEDED: You've reached the maximum number of brands allowed by your plan. Upgrade your plan to add more brands.
BRAND_DELETE_DEFAULT_BLOCKED: Cannot delete the default brand while other brands exist. Set another brand as default first, then retry.
BRAND_DELETE_LAST_BLOCKED: Cannot delete the last remaining brand in the workspace. Create another brand first, then retry.
BRAND_NAME_REQUIRED: Brand name is required and must not be blank.
